message:
chore(beads): bump local version tracker from 0.43.0 to 0.47.1

Updates the local beads schema version tracker to reflect compatibility
with the latest beads specification. This version file is used by the
beads daemon to track which schema version this repository is compatible
with, ensuring proper serialization and sync behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
